name: Bible
description: Canonical Holy Bible used for reading and study

name: Study Bible
description: Bible editions with footnotes, commentaries, or maps

name: Concordance Bible
description: Indexed references to verses or keywords in the Bible

name: Comprehensive Literature
description: Complete works or volumes of notable authors

name: Daily Bread
description: Daily devotional readings (e.g., Our Daily Bread)

name: Autobiography
description: Personal life stories of Christian figures

name: Other
description: Books that don't fit standard categories
